{{Relic Infobox|Forgotten Soul|2}}
{{R|Forgotten Soul||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Grave of the Forgotten|2}} event. Whenever you {{KW|Exhaust||2}} a card, it deals 1 damage to a random enemy.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from the {{E|Grave of the Forgotten|2}} event by selecting {{Frame|Accept the Forgotten Soul}}.
